form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after four months 6th of 8 at Palermo on March 9 over 1000m, 13 len behind Vitovka with 54.5kg at $15.60. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at this track on June 25 over 1100m, 0.1 len behind Inesperada Girl with 55kg at $6.75. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 15 at La Plata on March 31 over 1200m, on heavy track; 3 len behind Potro Famoso carrying 51.5kg at $82.10. The run before that didn't finish the race at this track March 25 over 1100m. Draws well and is a strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 44 days. Last start 3rd of 9 at Palermo on March 2 over 1100m, 2 len behind Corre El Moro with 54kg at $6.40. At only start last preparation 2nd of 12 at this track on December 3 over 1100m, behind Cordezuelo carrying 55kg at $6.60. This will test.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of 22 months. Finished off last campaign eighth of 11 at Palermo June 17 2024 over 1100m, 6 len behind Alto Light carrying 57kg at $7.70. When resuming last campaign third of 11 at Palermo May 13 2024 over 1000m, 7 len behind Pintman carrying 55kg at $15.70. May need the run.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation fifth of 7 at this track November 9 over 1000m, 3 len behind Dado Vision carrying 56kg at $7.45. Previously first up; fourth of 9 at this track September 14 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Cheque En Blanco with 56kg at $18.95. Look for a bold run.
